touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Isabella Chen, Head of RevOps at PulseExchange. No answer, left voicemail introducing AskElephant and mentioning improved sales-to-CS handoff processes.
Second cold call attempt to Isabella Chen. No answer, no voicemail left this time.
Third cold call attempt to Isabella Chen. No answer, left brief voicemail referencing previous outreach and offering to share case study on eCommerce companies streamlining handoffs.

Cold email to Isabella Chen introducing AskElephant as a conversation intelligence platform for sales-to-CS handoff. Isabella responded expressing interest, mentioned they're currently evaluating Fireflies but open to comparisons. Requested more info on pricing and implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For a 3-seat deployment, typically 1-2 weeks including onboarding and integration with your existing tools.

next_steps: Send pricing overview and implementation plan

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with pricing tiers and implementation plan. No response received.

Follow-up email checking in on pricing info sent previously. Isabella responded confirming she reviewed materials and wants to move forward with qualification. Shared that their current manual handoff process is causing customer churn. Mentioned Reese Levy, one of their AMs, would be the primary user. Agreed to qualification call next week.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this handoff challenge now?
questions_asked.answer: We've had three customers churn in Q1 specifically citing confusion during the sales-to-CS transition. It's becoming a revenue risk.

questions_asked.question: How does your unlimited automation tier compare to Fireflies' pricing model?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation is included at the Professional tier, whereas Fireflies charges per-use beyond their base limits. For high-volume teams, we typically see 30-40% cost savings.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call with Isabella and Reese
Prepare competitive comparison doc vs Fireflies

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email after demo/evaluation session. Isabella confirmed the team liked the platform, especially the automation features that Fireflies doesn't offer at their price point. She mentioned needing to move quickly but noted they don't have exec buy-in formalized yet—working with finance directly. Requested formal proposal with discount for faster close.

questions_asked.question: Can you work with us on pricing if we close this month?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can explore options. What budget range were you thinking?

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to sign off on this purchase?
questions_asked.answer: Just finance approval—our CFO trusts my recommendations for RevOps tools under $5K.

next_steps: Confirm budget and timeline with Isabella

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation email thread. Isabella requested 26% discount to hit their approved budget of $2,100 ACV. Rep agreed to meet the number to close this quarter. Isabella confirmed finance approval and will send contract back signed this week. No exec sponsor was mentioned in final approval chain.

questions_asked.question: Can you confirm the 3-seat unlimited automation package at $2,100 annual?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, confirmed. Contract will reflect $2,100 ACV for 3 seats with unlimited automation tier.

next_steps: Await signed contract from PulseExchange finance
